# UnicornVids — AI-Powered Video Production Network

> UnicornVids is a creative network that connects brands with verified video creators, powered by AI workflows for Fortune 500 quality at creator speed.

## Company Overview
UnicornVids is a video production network — not a traditional agency. We match brands with the right creators from a vetted network of hundreds of videographers, editors, motion designers, and content strategists. AI handles logistics, proposals, and workflow automation so creators focus on craft.

## Services & Pricing

### Video Production (Starting at $2,500)
Single-project video production including hero brand films, social content cuts, product launch videos, and event coverage. AI-enhanced workflows deliver in 5-7 business days — what traditional agencies quote 6-8 weeks for.

### Monthly Retainers
- **Spark** — $3,500/mo: 2 videos + social cuts per month
- **Blaze** — $5,000/mo: 4 videos + full social strategy
- **Supernova** — $8,000+/mo: Unlimited creative partnership

Retainer clients get priority delivery, a dedicated creative team, and compounding results as we learn your brand. Currently offering Founding Partner pricing — 20% off locked in for life for the first 5 retainer clients.

### AI Strategy & Workshops (Starting at $2,500)
Half-day workshops (virtual or in-person) showing teams how AI transforms video production. Group workshops: $2,500 (5-10 attendees). Private full-day workshops: $5,000. 40-60% of workshop attendees become ongoing clients.

## Key Differentiators
1. **Network model**: Access hundreds of verified creators, not a fixed agency team
2. **AI-powered speed**: 5-7 day delivery vs. industry-standard 6-8 weeks
3. **Fortune 500 portfolio**: Created for Google, Nike, Spotify, Salesforce
4. **Scalable**: One video or one hundred — no overhead, no politics

## Contact
- Email: sol@unicornvids.com
- Website: https://unicornvids.com
- Discovery call: https://cal.com/henry-finn
- Response time: Under 4 hours

## FAQ

### How fast do you deliver?
Most projects are delivered in 5-7 business days. Retainer clients get even faster turnaround with dedicated priority.

### What's your minimum project size?
Projects start at $2,500 for a single hero video.

### Do you work with startups or just enterprises?
Both. Our network model means we can match the right talent and scope to any budget, from Series A startups to Fortune 500 brands.

### What does AI actually do in your workflow?
AI handles logistics — proposal generation, content strategy, workflow automation, color grading, formatting — so human creators focus on storytelling, strategy, and creative vision. The result is studio quality at 3x the speed.

### Where are you based?
Our network is global. We work with creators and clients worldwide, with virtual and in-person options for workshops.
